title: Uploading documents and photos :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Uploading documents and photos
Find out what file formats documents must be in when you upload them into our system, and how to fix errors when uploading photos.
- File formats for uploading documents and photos All documents uploaded must be PDFs and all images must be JPEGs or JPGs.

## File formats for uploading documents and photos
All documents uploaded must be PDFs and all images must be JPEGs or JPGs.
- Acceptable photos for a visa or NZeTA The photo you give us for your visa or New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) application must clearly identify you, not be altered, and meet our photo standards.

## Acceptable photos for a visa or NZeTA
The photo you give us for your visa or New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA) application must clearly identify you, not be altered, and meet our photo standards.
- Fixing errors when uploading a photo When you submit a visa or an NZeTA photo online, you will get an error message if the photo does not meet requirements. Check what you can do to fix the errors.

## Fixing errors when uploading a photo
When you submit a visa or an NZeTA photo online, you will get an error message if the photo does not meet requirements. Check what you can do to fix the errors.
